description: Palm-sized fey pranksters wielding potent magic and vanishing in a shower of sparkling dust.
subraces: Flower-tending homebodies enchanting hedgerows and befriending pollinating insects.
Canopy dwellers guarding ancient trees and leading trespassers in circles for days.
Petal-winged charmers brewing love potions and coaxing blossoms to bloom out of season.
Ice-winged tricksters painting frost on windows and freezing streams solid for amusement.
